zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Curzon於1430年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾時，她的父親Richard Curzon160歲，母親Joan Baggott45歲。她和Sir Nicholas Griffin至少有5個兒子和10個女兒。她去世於1520年10月在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Curzon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Notre-Dame-de-Courson in Calvados, France, which was named with the Gallo-Roman personal name Curtius (from curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -o, genitive -onis. There is also a place called Curzon in Vendée, but this is not the source of the English surname.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Catharin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Cathrin
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catharine
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Curzon was born in 1430, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard Curzon, was 160 and her mother, Joan Baggott, was 45. She had at least 5 sons and 10 daughters with Sir Nicholas Griffin. She died in October 1520, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Curzon est née en 1430, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Curzon, avait 160 ans et sa mère, Joan Baggott, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 10 filles avec Sir Nicholas Griffin. Elle est décédée en octobre 1520, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans, et a été enterrée à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Curzon è nata il nel 1430 nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard Curzon, aveva 160 anni e sua madre, Joan Baggott, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 10 figlie con Sir Nicholas Griffin. Morì nel ottobre 1520, nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 90 anni, e fu sepolta a Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Curzonが1430年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard Curzonは160歳，母Joan Baggottは45歳であった。彼女はSir Nicholas Griffinとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と10人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1520年10月にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで90歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Curzon(이)가 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Curzon(은)는 160세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Baggott(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Sir Nicholas Griffin(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1520년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Curzon родилась в 1430 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard Curzon было 160 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Baggott, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 10 дочерей от Sir Nicholas Griffin. Она умерла октябрь 1520 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и была похоронена в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
